title: TTS narration not triggered when clicking into variations

source.notes: User report: navigating manually into a variation branch doesn't trigger TTS. TTS only fires via goToNext (arrow key / auto-advance), not goToMove (clicking a move in notation).

description: TTS narration is only wired into goToNext() at tree.ts:126, which always follows children[0] (mainline). When the user clicks a move in the notation panel — mainline or variation — it calls goToMove() at tree.ts:326 which just sets the position without triggering narration. The fix: add TTS narration to goToMove() so clicking any move (including variation moves) speaks its comment/annotation when auto-narrate is enabled.
notes: goToNext (line 126): calls stopSpeaking, then speakMoveNarration for children[0] — only mainline
goToMove (line 326): calls stopSpeaking, sets position — NO TTS
goToPrevious (line 158): calls stopSpeaking — NO TTS (correct, going backward shouldn't narrate)
The fix should: look up the node at the target position, check if auto-narrate is on, and speak if the node has a comment or annotations
Be careful: goToMove is called for ALL click navigation, not just variations. Don't double-narrate if the user is just clicking the next mainline move.
Key difference from goToNext: goToMove receives the full target path, so we need to resolve the node at that path

in_scope: Add TTS narration to goToMove in tree.ts
Speak the target node's comment/annotations when auto-narrate is enabled
Handle the case where the target node has no comment (don't speak)
out_of_scope: Adding TTS to goToPrevious (backward navigation shouldn't narrate)
TTS provider logic or voice selection

requirements: Clicking a variation move with a comment triggers TTS narration
Clicking a mainline move with a comment triggers TTS narration
Clicking a move without a comment does NOT trigger TTS
Auto-narrate disabled means no TTS on click
goToNext still works as before (arrow key navigation)
edge_cases: Clicking the same move twice — should replay narration, not double-fire
Rapidly clicking through variation moves — stopSpeaking should cancel prior
Clicking a move while TTS is mid-sentence — should stop and start new
Root node click (position []) — should not narrate

acceptance_gates: Clicking variation moves with comments triggers narration
Arrow key navigation still narrates as before
No narration when auto-narrate is off

manual: Load a game with comments and variations (with-comments.pgn)
Enable auto-narrate, click a variation move that has a comment — should narrate
Click a mainline move with a comment — should narrate
Click a move without a comment — should NOT narrate (just move sound)
Disable auto-narrate, click a commented variation move — should NOT narrate
Use arrow keys to navigate — should still narrate as before

done_criteria: goToMove triggers TTS for commented nodes when auto-narrate is on
Manual testing confirms variation narration works
